deliverables.description: WorkflowGateRunner introduced as runtime gate owner
Phase transitions enforce contracts through PhaseContractResolver.resolve() on the runtime path
PhaseStateEngine no longer contains hardcoded phase-specific exit dispatch

phase_contracts.yaml contains no issue-specific issue257 path literals after feature-boundary glob migration

deliverables.description: StateReconstructor introduced as dedicated reconstruction component
PhaseStateEngine.get_state no longer performs reconstruction or persistence side effects

cycles.exit_criteria: Reconstruction lives in StateReconstructor; get_state is pure query behavior; self.workspace_root is gone from PhaseStateEngine; recovery orchestration remains explicit in transition()

273.issue_title: Remove commit_prefix_map from git.yaml, fix PolicyEngine prefix SSOT

deliverables.description: tdd_phases block removed from .st3/config/git.yaml
commit_prefix_map block removed from .st3/config/git.yaml
tdd_phases field removed from GitConfig
commit_prefix_map field removed from GitConfig
validate_cross_references model_validator removed from GitConfig
has_phase() method removed from GitConfig
get_prefix() method removed from GitConfig
get_all_prefixes() returns list derived from commit_types
New dedicated validate_branch_name_pattern validator present in GitConfig
policies.yaml comment updated to reference commit_types
test_policy_engine_config.py docstring updated to reference commit_types

cycles.exit_criteria: All tests pass, zero occurrences of commit_prefix_map and tdd_phases in codebase (excl. .git/), quality gates clean on changed files.
cycles.green: Remove tdd_phases and commit_prefix_map from git.yaml and GitConfig. Delete has_phase(), get_prefix(), validate_cross_references. Extract branch_name_pattern to new validator. Rewrite get_all_prefixes() to use commit_types. Update comments in policies.yaml and policy_engine.py. Update docstring in test_policy_engine_config.py.
cycles.name: Remove commit_prefix_map and tdd_phases
cycles.red: Update all test fixtures and test files to expect the new state. Add test_get_all_prefixes asserting 11 types. Add test_commit_allows_all_commit_types for chore/fix/ci/build/perf/style/revert. Remove dead method tests (test_has_phase, test_get_prefix, old test_get_all_prefixes, test_invalid_commit_prefix_phase_raises). Clean 6 fixture helpers.
cycles.refactor: Quality gates on changed files. Grep codebase for zero hits on commit_prefix_map, tdd_phases, has_phase, get_prefix, validate_cross_references. Run full test suite.
